examples: Welcome to the world of Zara, purveyor of mass fashion.
Its shops include a Dairy Queen, a Victoria's Secret and a purveyor of comic T-shirts.
As a purveyor of "natural and organic produce", everything about Whole Foods shouts green.
This fall the chain has opened outlets of upscale cosmetics purveyor Sephora in its stores.
Anheuser-Busch InBev NV (NYSE: BUD) is the largest purveyor of beer around the world.
